hero.badge: Trusted by {shopCount}+ sellers across South Africa
hero.title: Sell Online in
hero.subtitle: Turn your WhatsApp business into a professional online catalog. Upload a photo — AI writes the listing. Share your link and get orders instantly.
hero.aiOffer: 10 FREE AI listings every month — no credit card needed

trustedBy.title: Trusted by sellers across South Africa

howItWorks.title: Create Your Online Shop in Three Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No coding, no designers, no expensive platforms. Just your products and a WhatsApp number.
howItWorks.step1Title: Snap a Photo → AI Lists It
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload a product photo and AI generates the title, description, category & SEO tags in 10 seconds. 10 free AI listings every month — no typing needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Get your unique URL. Drop it in WhatsApp groups, status, Instagram bio, TikTok — anywhere your customers hang out.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Customers browse, select options & quantities, and send you a clean structured order on WhatsApp. With order tracking built in.

features.title: Everything You Need to Sell Online in South Africa
features.subtitle: Built specifically for how South African sellers actually work.

whatsapp.title: Orders Straight to WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Customers pick sizes, colors, and quantities — then send you one clean order on WhatsApp. No confusion, no back-and-forth.

mobile.title: Works on Any Phone
mobile.description: No app to download. Your customers tap a link and browse. Even on slow mobile data — it still loads fast.

variants.title: Sizes, Colors & Options
variants.description: Customers pick exactly what they want — no more "which size?" messages. You set the options, they choose.

tracking.title: Track Every Order
tracking.description: Every order gets a tracking number. Update status as you go: Pending → Confirmed → Shipped → Delivered.

analytics.title: See Who's Viewing Your Products
analytics.description: Know which products get the most views, what gets clicked, and what actually converts to WhatsApp orders.

photos.title: Fast-Loading Photos
photos.description: Upload your product photos — we make them load fast on any phone, even on 3G. Crystal clear, every time.

import.title: Upload All Products at Once
import.description: Got a spreadsheet with 100+ products? Import them all in seconds. We'll create everything for you.

marketplace.title: Get Found by New Buyers
marketplace.description: Your products appear on the TradeFeed marketplace — thousands of SA buyers browsing daily. Free exposure.

notifications.title: Never Miss a Sale
notifications.description: Get notified instantly when you receive an order, when stock runs low, or when a buyer leaves a review.

reviews.title: Buyer Reviews & Ratings
reviews.description: Let happy customers vouch for you. Reviews build trust and help new buyers choose your products.

verified.title: Verified Seller Badge
verified.description: Show buyers you're a legit business with a verified badge. Trust = more sales. It's that simple.

revenue.title: Know Your Numbers
revenue.description: See your daily revenue, best-selling products, and growth trends. Know exactly what's working.

pricing.title: Start Free. Scale Your Online Shop When Ready.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Upgrade only when your business grows.

proPlan.name: Pro
proPlan.subtitle: For growing businesses
features: Never miss a sale — instant alerts

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

cta.title: Ready to
cta.subtitle: Upload a photo, AI creates the listing, share on WhatsApp. Your first 5 AI listings are free — start selling in under 3 minutes.
cta.footer: 10 free AI listings · No credit card · Set up in under 3 minutes · Cancel anytime

errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.offlineDesc: Check your internet connection and try again. Your cart and wishlist are saved locally — they'll be here when you're back online.
errors.loadShedding: Load shedding? Your data is safe.

footer.tagline: Structured catalogs for SA wholesalers & retailers
